channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Drain cover noise, 16th May
item.description:
Due to the road works from Thames Water and that part of Chislehurst Road only had one lane. There is a loose drain cover which is being driven over by every vehicle and is very loud and a disturbance.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Upperton Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Streetlight too bright, 16th May
item.description:
Why is this streetlight next to the flats in Brenchley Gardens so bright so that it illuminates the gardens behind?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 145-159, Brenchley Gardens, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car, 16th May
item.description:
Car is taxed but need to find the owner as it has a flat and has been here for months.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 58, Breakspears Drive, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement up, 16th May
item.description:
Pavement has been up for a long time. Today and a few days ago tripped on Pavement. Next to Fern Lodge play park and basketball court

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Esam Way, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped sofa at beginning of Curtis Way, 16th May
item.description:
Black leather sofa flytipped on Curtis Way, please clear

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Curtis Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of abandoned litter fly-tipped, 16th May
item.description:
An ongoing issue of someone abandoning rubbish here, dozens of bags a week
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stanborough Passage, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Human faeces and urine, 16th May
item.description:
Several people have urinated and/or deficated leaving faeces and large amount of urine in the area.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stanborough Passage, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping behind 287 Chase Road in the allotments, 16th May
item.description:
Been there for months now

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chase Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped builders waste, 16th May
item.description:
By entrance to mansion block - black bag, wood, tubing. Been there for over three weeks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 128, Herne Hill, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On road drain on Marlow road blocked - overflowing water when high volume flooding pavement, 16th May
item.description:
The blocked drain is unable to cope with higher volumes of water, which is leading to water and mud covering the pavement. The drain needs 1) unblocking and 2) to be extended to the end of marlow road with more grates to catch more water as it flows off the train embankments and Cambridge Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marlow Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on TfL cabinet, 16th May
item.description:
Black TfL cabinet covered in white graffiti tags.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cobbett Street, Oval, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped sofa near pedestrian crossing between St Faith’s and Nairn Grove, 16th May
item.description:
On the drive near the courtyard flats on Red Post Hill.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Red Post Hill, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fence as fallen down, 16th May
item.description:
Fence next to the foot path as fallen down

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woodbine Grove, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gipsy Road SE27 at Gipsy Hill junction is a zebra cro, 16th May
item.description:
Gipsy Road SE27 at Gipsy Hill junction is a zebra crossing with one Belisha Beacon not working Tuesday night.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 188, Gipsy Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged Car, 16th May
item.description:
Silver Mercedes, reg DYM 227V, parked in a bay. Taxed but no MOT. Car has significant damage to the front of the vehicle.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Burnell Avenue, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Aside of junction Gresse St & Stephen Mews, 16th May
item.description:
Ammonia showing in water leaking into pub cellar under Gresse St.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Gresse Street, Covent Garden, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chippings from pothole and being ejected and damaging vehicles in Kenilworth Road, 16th May
item.description:
Chippings from an unattended pothole are being ejected and damaging vehicles, see attached.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kenilworth Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fire-damaged car, 16th May
item.description:
Please see the photo.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Knoll Road, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-posting, 16th May
item.description:
Please see the photo.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alma Road, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black graffiti tag on northern side of Lesnes Abbey walkover nearest pavement., 16th May
item.description:
This area is a hotspot for graffiti. These fools have done it again. Please put cameras so we can track and find and deal with these miscreants.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Abbey Way, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
